prospect_asset_matches.why: GreenPath provides DMP services. Debt snowball widget shows exact payoff order, interest savings, and timeline — directly relevant to their core debt management counseling.
30+ calculator titles but all appear to be basic static forms. Debt snowball widget with visual payoff tracking is a genuine upgrade for their debt-stressed audience.
Debt-focused site needs a visual 'snowball vs avalanche' comparison tool. Complements their debt consolidation articles with actionable decision support.
Credit union members use mortgage calculators during home buying. QFINHUB's interactive version with visual amortization is a member experience upgrade.
Budget planning audience needs savings projections. Simple interest calculator shows 'what if I save X?' scenarios — natural companion to their budgeting tools.
University extension serves families planning for retirement. Interactive calculator with visual projections fits their educational mission better than static forms.
Investor audience actively manages capital gains. This calculator fills a gap in their 'Foolish Calculators' collection — they have loans, retirement, mortgages, but no capital gains tax tool.
Parents saving for college also invest for retirement. This calculator complements their 529 tools — 'save for college AND retirement' is the natural cross-sell.

Adapted as 'Net Worth Projector' — readers input assets/liabilities, see compound growth trajectory. Complements J. Money's spreadsheet with a visual snapshot between monthly updates. No login, instant results.
prospect_asset_matches.custom_example_idea: Net Worth Projector: input current assets/liabilities → see compound growth trajectory over 5/10/15/20 years with dynamic chart. Complements his spreadsheet template with quick visual checks.
